tuning: E A D G B E
content:
I was looking at tabs for this song and found one good one with chords, however it was 
with a capo on the 4th fret. This is a version for anyone looking to play it without a capo.

Feel free to play with power chords or barre chords. Try a bunch of ways and see which 
and sounds best for you.

The main chords are [ch]C#m[/ch]/[ch]B[/ch]/[ch]E[/ch]/[ch]A[/ch] Until the bridge where it's [ch]G#m[/ch]/[ch]C#m[/ch]/[ch]E[/ch]/[ch]A[/ch]

I like to play the verses like this

[tab]    [ch]C#m[/ch]         [ch]B[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]                   Repeat
e|---------------------------------------------------------------------------|
B|---------------------------------------------------------------------------|
G|----------------------------9-9-9------------------------------------------|
D|-11-11-11----9-9-9-9-9------------------7-7-7-7-7--------------------------|
A|----------------------------7-7-7------------------------------------------|
E|--9--9--9----7-7-7-7-7------------------5-5-5-5-5--------------------------|[/tab]

If your looking for a more basic way you can use this

[tab]          [ch]C#m[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]
I came to dance, dance, dance, dance,[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
I hit the floor, cause[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C#m[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]
That's my plans, plans, plans, plans,[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
I'm wearing all my favorite[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]              [ch]B[/ch]
Brands, brands, brands, brands[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
Give me space for both my[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]
Hands, hands, hands, hands[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
You, you[/tab]


Now is the chorus. Here, I just play the basic chords near the top of the fretboard so 
not putting up a tab, just the chords.

[tab]             [ch]C#m[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
Cause it goes on and on and on[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C#m[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
And it goes on and on and on[/tab]


[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]        [ch]B[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
I throw my hands up in the air sometimes[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
Saying Aaaaaaa-Yooooo[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
Gotta let go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
I wanna celebrate and live my life[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C#m[/ch]     [ch]B[/ch]
Saying Aaaaaaa-Yooooo[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
Baby, let's go[/tab]


[tab]              [ch]C#m[/ch]        [ch]B[/ch]
'Cause we gon' rock this club[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
We gon' go all night[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C#m[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]
We gon' light it up[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
Like it's dynamite[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C#m[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]
Cause I told you once[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
Now I told you twice[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C#m[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]
We gon' light it up[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
Like it's dynamite[/tab]

The second verse is played the same as the first, but I'll put up the chords anyway.

[tab]         [ch]C#m[/ch]          [ch]B[/ch]
I came to move, move, move, move[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
Get out the way me and[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C#m[/ch]          [ch]B[/ch]
My crew, crew, crew, crew[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]
I'm in the club so[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C#m[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]
I'm gonna do, do, do, do[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
Just drop the phone, came here to[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]
Do, do, do, do[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
Yeah, yeah[/tab]


Back to the chorus again....

[tab]            [ch]C#m[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
Cause it goes on and on and on[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C#m[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
And it goes on and on and on[/tab]


[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]        [ch]B[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
I throw my hands up in the air sometimes[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
Saying Aaaaaaa-Yooooo[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
Gotta let go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
I wanna celebrate and live my life[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C#m[/ch]     [ch]B[/ch]
Saying Aaaaaaa-Yooooo[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
Baby, let's go[/tab]


[tab]              [ch]C#m[/ch]        [ch]B[/ch]
'Cause we gon' rock this club[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
We gon' go all night[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C#m[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]
We gon' light it up[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
Like it's dynamite[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C#m[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]
Cause I told you once[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
Now I told you twice[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C#m[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]
We gon' light it up[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
Like it's dynamite[/tab]

Now we're at the bridge. I'll put up the chords and a tab of the chord shape I use. It's 
just single-strum chords until "I just want it all..." where there's a pickup rythm.

[tab]    [ch]G#m[/ch]  [ch]C#m[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
e|--4-------4--------0----------0-----------------------------------------------|
B|--4-------5--------0----------2-----------------------------------------------|
G|--4-------6--------1----------2-----------------------------------------------|
D|--6-------6--------2----------2-----------------------------------------------|
A|--6-------4--------2----------0-----------------------------------------------|
E|--4----------------0----------------------------------------------------------|[/tab]


[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]                [ch]C#m[/ch]
I'm gonna take it all out[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
I'm gonna be the last one standing[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]       [ch]C#m[/ch]
I'm over all[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
I'm gonna be the last one landing[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]          [ch]C#m[/ch]
Cause I, I, Believe it[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
And I, I, I...[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
I just want it all[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
I just want it all[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
I'm gonna put my hands in the air[/tab]
Hands in the air
Put your hands in the air

Fill
[ch]C#m[/ch]/[ch]B[/ch]/[ch]E[/ch]/[ch]A[/ch] (x2)


[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]        [ch]B[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
I throw my hands up in the air sometimes[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
Saying Aaaaaaa-Yooooo[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
Gotta let go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
I wanna celebrate and live my life[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C#m[/ch]     [ch]B[/ch]
Saying Aaaaaaa-Yooooo[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
Baby, let's go[/tab]


[tab]              [ch]C#m[/ch]        [ch]B[/ch]
'Cause we gon' rock this club[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
We gon' go all night[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C#m[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]
We gon' light it up[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
Like it's dynamite[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C#m[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]
Cause I told you once[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
Now I told you twice[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C#m[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]
We gon' light it up[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
Like it's dynamite[/tab]


If you have any corrections, please leave a comment.
Thanks!


************************************

| /   slide up
| \   slide down
| h   hammer-on
| p   pull-off
| ~   vibrato
| +   harmonic
| x   Mute note
| b   Bend
| pb  Pre-bend
| br  Bend release
| pbr Pre-bend release
| brb Bend release bend

************************************
